title: feat(sdk): audio overhaul — dedicated TTS/music endpoints
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: The hive finds its voice
gist.blurb: We've completely overhauled audio in the SDK. Generating text-to-speech and music is now as simple as grabbing a binary buffer, complete with handy new save and export helpers.
gist.summary: The SDK now features dedicated endpoints for text-to-speech and music generation, returning binary audio buffers with built-in helper methods.
gist.impact: Developers can now easily generate, save, and export audio and music directly using the new generateAudio and audioSpeech methods.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee wearing cute chunky headphones, listening to music or a podcast. A retro boombox or a synthesizer keyboard nearby. Musical notes floating in the air.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing chunky retro headphones, bobbing her head to music next to a vintage 8-bit boombox. Colorful pixel musical notes float in the air. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing chunky retro headphones, bobbing her head to music next to a vintage 8-bit boombox. Colorful pixel musical notes float in the air.
